image:image.image:title: CRUMS Leasing - Trailer Leasing Solutions
image:image.image:caption: CRUMS Leasing provides flexible trailer leasing and rental solutions for carriers across the United States

image:image.image:caption: Fleet of CRUMS Leasing branded 53-foot dry van trailers ready for lease

image:image.image:caption: Open-deck flatbed trailer for oversized and heavy cargo

image:image.image:caption: Temperature-controlled reefer trailer for perishable goods

image:image.image:title: Dry Van Trailer Leasing - CRUMS Leasing
image:image.image:caption: 53-foot and 48-foot enclosed dry van trailers for lease with swing and roll-up door options

image:image.image:title: Flatbed Trailer Leasing - CRUMS Leasing
image:image.image:caption: Standard and step deck flatbed trailers for heavy and oversized cargo hauling

image:image.image:title: Refrigerated Trailer Leasing - CRUMS Leasing
image:image.image:caption: Temperature-controlled reefer trailers with multi-zone capability for perishable freight

image:image.image:title: 2020 Dry Van Trailer 56171 - CRUMS Leasing
image:image.image:caption: 2020 53-foot dry van trailer available for lease from CRUMS Leasing

image:image.image:title: Trailer 56171 Exterior Side View
image:image.image:caption: 2020 Dry Van Trailer 56171 exterior side view showing clean white panels and trailer number markings

image:image.image:title: CRUMS Leasing Fleet Yard
image:image.image:caption: CRUMS Leasing fleet yard with multiple dry van trailers including unit 56171

image:image.image:title: Trailer 56171 Rear Doors
image:image.image:caption: Trailer 56171 rear swing doors closed with safety reflective tape and DOT compliance stickers

image:image.image:title: Trailer 56171 Interior Cargo Area
image:image.image:caption: Full interior cargo area view showing clean wood floor, aluminum walls, and 53-foot length

image:image.image:title: Interior Logistic Posts and E-track
image:image.image:caption: Interior logistic posts and E-track rails for secure load tie-down and cargo securement

image:image.image:title: Great Dane Air Ride Suspension
image:image.image:caption: Great Dane air ride suspension system with airbags and shock absorbers

image:image.image:title: FMCSA Inspection Label
image:image.image:caption: FMCSA annual vehicle inspection label and manufacturer data plate showing DOT compliance

image:image.image:title: 53-Foot Dry Van Full Side Profile
image:image.image:caption: Full side profile view of 53-foot dry van trailer showing aluminum body, landing gear, and tandem axles

image:image.image:title: Tandem Axle and Tires
image:image.image:caption: Tandem axle with commercial-grade tires and mud flaps in good condition

image:image.image:caption: Enclosed dry van trailers for general freight - most common trailer type in trucking
